title: Opus 4.8 Just Dropped. Here's How To Actually Use It.
summary: Nate Herk reviews Claude Opus 4.8 release, analyzing benchmark performance and documenting practical workflow integration strategies. The video critiques benchmark-only evaluation and highlights improvements over Opus 4.7, including honesty and reasoning improvements.
